overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game. The player walks through a nighttime expedition camp with canvas tents and campfires, enters a tent to look around, then exits and continues walking along a dirt road through a rural settlement with wooden farmhouses and fences.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered camp area at night, approaching two men standing and talking near a tent entrance. Canvas canopies stretch overhead, and a campfire burns in the center of the path, casting warm orange light on the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: canvas tent interior with camping supplies

events.description: enters a tent, transitioning from outdoor camp to enclosed interior
exits the tent back to the open camp area

agents.ego_description: enters a tent and looks around the interior at the furnishings and supplies before exiting

wooden camp bed with folded blankets

small black wood-burning stove for heating the tent
stacked wooden crates in the corner of the tent

segments.scene_description: The player enters a tent, revealing a cozy interior lit by a lantern on a wooden table. A cot, wood stove, and supply crates furnish the space. After a brief look around, the player exits back to the camp.

events.description: game UI interaction prompt appears indicating option to stop or interact

agents.ego_description: walking through the camp away from the tent, passing the two men and heading toward the camp exit

notable_agents.action: two men continue standing and talking near the tent entrance as the player walks away

campfire burning in the left side of the camp area

segments.scene_description: The player walks back through the camp, passing the two men who remain talking in the distance. The camera moves past tents and campfires, with a game UI prompt briefly appearing, then continues toward the camp exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with wooden fences and distant farmhouses

events.description: exits the covered camp into open countryside with visible night sky
passes a wooden wagon on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt road through a rural settlement at night, passing wooden fences and farmhouses

entered.detail: wide dirt road stretching into the distance
wooden split-rail fence running alongside the road
two-story wooden farmhouse with lit windows in the distance
old wooden wagon with wheels parked by the fence
trees scattered across the open field

segments.scene_description: The player exits the camp into open countryside under a clear night sky. Walking along a dirt road, the scene reveals wooden farmhouses with glowing windows in the distance, split-rail fences, and an old wooden wagon parked by the roadside. The environment transitions from the enclosed camp to the expansive rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins within the enclosed warmth of a nighttime expedition camp and expands into a wide, rural landscape. It begins by moving through a camp area under canvas canopies, passing a central campfire that casts an orange glow over the dirt ground as the camera approaches two men talking. The movement then flows into the cozy interior of a tent, momentarily revealing a lantern-lit space with a cot and supply crates before exiting back into the camp. As the camera passes the talking men and the remaining tents, the scene opens up and shifts from the sheltered camp to the open countryside under a clear night sky. Finally, the path leads along a dirt road lined with split-rail fences and a parked wooden wagon, moving toward distant farmhouses with glowing windows.
